meaning: n.唐杜里烹饪法,泥炉炭火烹饪法(一种印度烹饪法)
examples: Marinade the chicken breasts in the tandoori paste.
Even more delicious was the juicy meat and rich flavor of the murgh tandoori .
In the modern world, the "tandoori chicken tikka masala" became Britain's national dish!
Red tandoori chicken and Punjabi breads have become regular staples in Indian restaurants in the West.
Especially delicious: tandoori lamb chops, and aloo gobi matar (potato, cauliflower and green peas in a blend of onion, ginger and spices).
